_README: Leg-state OVERLAY for the OPG formalization manifest. The manifest (opg_corpus_manifest.json) is REGENERATED by build_opg_manifest.py, so per-milestone leg progress lives here instead and is MERGED (not overwritten) at build time; the builder VALIDATES this overlay (slugs exist; states allowed; non-todo states carry commit+package provenance). Keyed by manifest slug. Update via the workflow's legs_update + a human acceptance check (meta/check_milestone.py).

reeds_omega_delta_and_chi_conjecture.note: axiom-free, compiles; Reed⊥B-K refuted-direction recorded (see AUDIT_NOTES.md)

the_borodin_kostochka_conjecture.note: axiom-free, compiles; independence from Reed recorded

cycles_in_graphs_of_large_chromatic_numb.note: 2<k floor confirmed faithful (k=1,2 are genuine counterexamples) — see AUDIT_NOTES.md

erdos_faber_lovasz_conjecture.note: status solved (KKKMO 2023); stated as Definition, proof optional

barnettes_conjecture.note: unblocked via base wagner_planar (Wagner: no K5/K3,3 minor); axiom-free, no G2/fourcolor

decomposing_the_prism_of_a_3_connected_c.note: unblocked via base wagner_planar (Wagner: no K5/K3,3 minor); axiom-free, no G2/fourcolor

partial_list_coloring.note: t=0 vacuously true (not false); faithful for t>=1

behzads_conjecture.note: msimple guard = simple graph (faithful TCC); list_total->behzads refuted-direction

partitioning_edge_connectivity.note: directional-walk flag fixed via local undirected uwalk (faithful)

jones_conjecture.note: unblocked via base wagner_planar (Wagner: no K5/K3,3 minor); axiom-free, no G2/fourcolor

domination_in_cubic_graphs.note: Reed; k_connected G 3 + regular G 3 -> gamma <= ceil(n/3)

domination_in_plane_triangulations.note: Wave 1 + review fix: connected [set:G] guard added (unguarded form was provably FALSE via disjoint triangles under truncated Euler genus); commit PENDING2

partitioning_planar_digraphs.note: done via combinatorial planar_sg (Wagner K5/K3,3-minor-free); axiom-free, NOT G2

oriented_chromatic_number_of_planar_grap.note: done via planar_sg (Wagner); axiom-free, NOT G2

large_acyclic_induced_subdigraph_in_a_pl.note: done via planar_sg (Wagner); axiom-free, NOT G2; target of candidate

complexity_of_the_h_factor_problem.note: NP_hard for non-trivial H (2<|H| /\ connected); universal reduction claim, non-vacuous; Track-B skeptic caught the a<=b guard REFUTABLE (c=1 empties instances) — fixed to a<b

algorithm_for_graph_homomorphisms.note: Track B: coupled prog model (decides_on + c^(n+m) pcost bound on the SAME program); audit SOUND, survived oracle attacks (Qed'd defense)

approximation_ratio_for_maximum_edge_dis.note: Track B: selected proposition = the o(sqrt n)-improvement branch (the source's disjunction is a classical tautology — audit-caught); value-estimation form, coupled prog + poly cost; no-const-prog defense Qed'd

ptas_for_feedback_arc_set_in_tournaments.note: Track B: PTAS as eps-before-program over coupled prog model; cross-multiplied (1+eps) sandwich on fas_opt; audit SOUND (solved row; value-estimation form)

finding_k_edge_outerplanar_graph_embeddi.note: Track B: coupled prog model + REPAIRED level-partition proxy (audit caught Pconst(1) proving the old elev-proxy form); stays partial — proxy for the true embedding-based k-edge-outerplanarity (Track-A layer makes it expressible, follow-up)

asymptotic_distribution_of_form_of_polyh.note: planarity omitted (=3-connected, not polyhedra); fix=three_connb /\ wagner_planar

covering_powers_of_cycles_with_equivalen.note: 2k<n guard admits n=2k+1 (refutable); regime guard insufficient

the_crossing_number_of_the_complete_grap.note: Wave 2: direct form is_crossing_number 'K_n (Guy value) — non-vacuous (achievability part of the claim); %/4 exact for all n (audited)

the_crossing_number_of_the_complete_bipa.note: Wave 2: direct form is_crossing_number (KB m n) (Zarankiewicz value) — non-vacuous; degenerate m,n<=2 verified planar/0

crossing_numbers_and_coloring.note: Wave 2: sub-level form (forall k achievable for G, exists j<=k achievable for K_t) — robust to exactly-k non-monotonicity; t=5 slice carries 4CT strength (audited)

the_crossing_number_of_the_hypercube.note: Wave 2: two-sided eps-N on achievable counts — body <-> minimum-in-window proven by audit probes; N>=4 quantifier order load-bearing and correct

3_colourability_of_arrangements_of_great.note: needs topological layer: spherical arrangement geometry

are_different_notions_of_the_crossing_nu.note: needs topological layer: two distinct drawing semantics

crossing_sequences.note: blocker narrowed (signed-layer audit): orientable layer + crossing.v xsplit already suffice to state cr-on-S_i (least splits landing in embeds_in_genus i, connected witnesses); attemptable in a future push

drawing_disconnected_graphs_on_surfaces.note: needs topological layer: optimal drawings on a surface

small_universal_point_sets_for_planar_gr.note: faithful finite-geometry encoding (foundations/geometry.v, orient-only): n_universal over R:rcfType — injective placement, no vertex on a non-incident edge, independent edges never seg_meet (full closed-segment test); NO general-position side condition. forall R:rcfType + Tarski-Seidenberg => equivalent to the R^2 source (proof AND disproof transfer). Audited 3/3 SOUND (oracle-attack + source-faithfulness + rocq-semantics), synth SOUND_DONE, 0 blockers; 5 note-level caveats recorded (metatheoretic Tarski transfer; all-n O(n) form; seq-multiplicity; c-inside-forall-R; K1-only grounding).

consecutive_non_orientable_embedding_obs.note: signed layer (emap/orientable_map/seuler_genus) now EXISTS; still blocked on 4 statement-level items: (a) embeds-in-N_k (min over NON-orientable schemes; semb_in_genus leaks orientable schemes — K7 torus vs crosscap 3), (b) disconnected-graph embeddability semantics (obstruction minors ARE disconnected), (c) edgeless/K1 empty-map anomaly guard, (d) proper-minor predicate

grunbaums_conjecture.note: Wave 1: dual 3-edge-colouring via embedding triangulation; STATUS caveat: general orientable form refuted (Kochol 2009), low-genus cases open; encoding faithful to the OPG source; signed-layer audit: orientability LOAD-BEARING (emap generalization classically false: K6 triangulates N_1 with Petersen dual)

the_circular_embedding_conjecture.note: signed-map (general-surface) form via foundations/signed_embedding.v: exists emap with all face boundaries cycles; k_connected 2 guard makes flag-orbit source-injectivity exactly boundary-is-cycle; audited 5/5 sound (skeptic: no trivialization/refutation)

what_is_the_largest_graph_of_positive_cu.note: Wave 1 (embedding foundation): bounded-sup via combinatorial curvature + prism/antiprism

counting_3_colorings_of_the_hex_lattice.note: hex-lattice limit re-encoded axiom-free over rcfType (persite_cauchy), no Stdlib Reals

end_devouring_rays.note: iGraph carrier suffices; needs ends machinery

hamiltonian_cycles_in_line_graphs_of_inf.note: iGraph carrier suffices; needs infinite Hamiltonicity (topological double-ray cycles)

hamiltonian_cycles_in_powers_of_infinite.note: iGraph carrier suffices; needs infinite Hamiltonicity

infinite_uniquely_hamiltonian_graphs.note: iGraph carrier suffices; needs one-ended + infinite Hamiltonicity

seymours_self_minor_conjecture.note: iGraph carrier suffices; needs infinite-graph minor theory

unfriendly_partitions.note: iGraph carrier suffices; needs cardinal neighbour comparison

strong_matchings_and_covers.note: iGraph carrier suffices; needs infinite hypergraph order theory

characterizing_aleph_0_aleph_1_graphs.note: out of scope: aleph_1 cardinal arithmetic

coloring_the_odd_distance_graph.note: out of scope: R^2 odd-distance geometry

highly_arc_transitive_two_ended_digraphs.note: out of scope: ends + automorphism action
